race.comment: ON LOCATION (2) was third-up and backed off the map beaten a half-length here this grade. He will jump and run from the inside gate and Wiggins rides today. Tough to beat. Cormack is off the above to stick with FELIPITY (6), who stalked the speed at Townsville first up, before folding right up. Went close here before the break and drawn well, a much better effort is likely. SPORT (3) finished his first campaign with a distant placing over 1050m at Rockhampton. He's been gelded since and owns an easy Rockhampton trial win. Sharp improvement is on the cards. Solid top-three hope. BLESSED BOOM (4) debuts and is a Taylor-trained stablemate to OL. Placed second behind the above in the recent trial and has to be kept onside.
